title: Celestia Craft
description: This is a mod for Xianxia
body:
This mod has added minerals called spirit stones, and can use spirit stone making tools, convert spirit stone attributes, etc.
You can use spiritual power to attack  enitities or mine blocks,Press "O" to use them
Put a spirit stone in your hand and press o, you will get 1 spiritual power
Spiritual Power will increase naturally during your game

You can find spirit stone ores in the main world, use diamond drafts to mine them, and then put the obtained ores into the furnace to burn them to obtain spirit stones.

The formulas supported by this mod are:

1. Synthesize the Spiritual Sword in the Crafting Table![spiritual sword recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54ece520299bb52d95fbfb506800ec0d8bd22099.png)
2. Synthesize the spirit table in the Crafting Table (in the current version it is only for decoration)
![Spiritual Table Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bda5c75e93a064e3ce24acff24b56abf2675bea.png)
3. Make spirit stones of different attributes, including gold, wood, water, fire, and dirt
   ![water spirit stone recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba5588530ba952a0f61fdc27e7eae5e887b4d3ce.png)
   ![fire spirit stone recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6560d682161d28c186d68ea648ed96bd59908a9e.png)
   ![gold spirit stone recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f51b7685f34a0670bff96008cd0c3ee550f995e.png)
   ![wood spirit stone recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45ccabc3eb4f7d5ec8634b95fd045e9ae45f9406.png)
   ![dirt spirit stone recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e73e2d8a034e061671bc33022d234bf4264a234.png)
4. Burning an iron sword in the furnace will get the spiritual sword blank
5.  Synthesize the Spiritual Pickaxe in the Crafting Table!
   ![Spiritual Pickaxe Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4031f5cbe8a6c4514eb900dcd241246c6c74d55.png)
6. Synthesize the Fire Spiritual Sword in the Crafting Table by putting the spiritual sword in the middle surrounding by fire spirit stones
